<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ /* * Authors: * - Arne Goetje arne@canonical.com */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/en.php', [ 'formats' => [ 'L' => 'YYYY-MM-DD', ], 'months' => ['1goe̍h', '2goe̍h', '3goe̍h', '4goe̍h', '5goe̍h', '6goe̍h', '7goe̍h', '8goe̍h', '9goe̍h', '10goe̍h', '11goe̍h', '12goe̍h'], 'months_short' => ['1g', '2g', '3g', '4g', '5g', '6g', '7g', '8g', '9g', '10g', '11g', '12g'], 'weekdays' => ['lé-pài-ji̍t', 'pài-it', 'pài-jī', 'pài-saⁿ', 'pài-sì', 'pài-gō͘', 'pài-la̍k'], 'weekdays_short' => ['lp', 'p1', 'p2', 'p3', 'p4', 'p5', 'p6'], 'weekdays_min' => ['lp', 'p1', 'p2', 'p3', 'p4', 'p5', 'p6'], 'first_day_of_week' => 0, 'day_of_first_week_of_year' => 1, 'meridiem' => ['téng-po͘', 'ē-po͘'], ]);
